Plaintiff Stephen Amato-Salvatierra'S Motion To Compel Reponses To Requests For Admission, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Stephen Amato-Salvatierra'S Motion To Compel Reponses To Requests For Admission, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents - Off calendar, duplicate entry.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents Propounded On Jared Friedland;
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on July 7, 2014:
Jared M. Cohen, Esq. (415.326.4044) for Plaintiff STEPHEN AMATO-SALVATIERRA
Edgar W. Hawkyard, Esq. of Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh (925.825.9500) for Defendant JARED FRIEDLAND

RULING: Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling PLAINTIFF STEPHEN AMATO-SALVATIERRA'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents Propounded On Jared Friedland is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Friedland shall serve verifications of his discovery responses within fifteen days of service of entry of this Order. Amato-Salvatierra's request for sanctions is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302)

Mtn To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Edgar William Hawkyard, Esq. of the Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500.x815, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
Jared M. Cohen, ESq. of the Law Offices of Jared M. Cohen, Tel. 415.326.4044, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. After argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JARED FRIEDLAND'S Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages is denied. Paragraphs 30 and 31 plead conduct that supports the prayer for punitive damages. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
